items.title: Weighing The Hammer
items.description: Stocks staged a 3% levitation act this morning before fading to the close, landing close enough to a bear market.

items.title: Trump's 104% Tariff On Chinese Imports Sends Stock Futures Plunging — Dow Falls Over 500 Points
items.description: Stock futures tumbled on Tuesday evening as markets braced for President Donald Trump's 104% tariff on Chinese imports taking effect at 12:01 a.m. ET Wednesday, erasing a brief relief rally and sending major indexes to significant lows.

items.title: NFIB Small Business Survey: Sales Growth Expectations Scaled Back
items.description: The NFIB Small Business Optimism Index dropped for a third straight month, falling to 97.4 in March.

items.title: U.S. Recession Odds Just Hit 62%: Trade Carefully
items.description: Investors need to understand market volatility as they navigate the turmoil. Read more on what could be next for Wall Street.

items.title: The Economic Reality Of Tariffs
items.description: Tariffs harm economic growth, raise prices, stifle innovation, and misallocate resources. Click here to find out more about the U.S. Economy.
